prev_race.name: IM Italy Emilia-Romagna
prev_race.notes: Bike: Lap 2 fade (-60W on Bertinoro vs Lap 1), decoupling 14.5%. Run: walk-breaks added ~15 min from km 13.

race_targets.swim_how: Bilateral breathing, sighting, OWS sets from May
race_targets.bike_how: First 90 min ≤IF 0.68. Bertinoro ≤IF 0.78. VI <1.05. Long Z2 volume to fix 14.5% decoupling.
race_targets.t1t2_how: Transition drill: bag layout, wetsuit-off, helmet-on sequence
race_targets.run_how: Aid-station ≤30 sec (walk-breaks cost ~15 min in 2025). Heat acclimatisation from 15 May. Loop 1: ease to 5:10→settle to 4:58.
